cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The passage is about how enjoying the arts from an early age can lead to better career success. The question is asking what a person who enjoys the arts may do, based on the information given. First, I'll read through the passage again to make sure I understand the key points. The study mentioned found that people who enjoyed the arts had better jobs and higher salaries. Then it explains why: because art helps develop reasoning, problem-solving, creative and critical thinking skills. The passage also says that art excites imagination, makes us think, and helps us see the world beyond our own experience. It mentions that art allows us to appreciate different perspectives, which helps in communicating and cooperating with others. Now, looking at the options: A) see things from different points of view B) deal with problems worse than others C) be difficult to communicate with others D) prefer to stay at home rather than go out The passage clearly states that the arts help develop the ability to see things from many different points of view. It also says that this helps in communicating and cooperating with others. So, option A is directly supported by the text. Option B is the opposite of what the passage says. It mentions that art helps with problem-solving, so B would be incorrect. Option C is also incorrect because the passage
